Design Language

Expressive Glass —
liquid by nature.

Organic Depth

Wallpapers that breathe with the system

Liquid Glass

Translucent surfaces that refract the world behind — not just blur it. Like real glass, but digital.

Material 3 Expressive

Color, shape, and motion that respond to context — personality built into every pixel.

Motion as Language

Fluid, purposeful animation that communicates meaning — every transition tells a story.

Mobile Experience

A UI that
earns attention.

MultiOS Deep Island reimagines the first thing you see every day. Time as giant typography. Notifications as frosted glass cards. A depth layer that makes the wallpaper feel alive.

Depth-aware oversized clock
Frosted glass notification cards
Wallpaper-reactive UI tinting
Always-on ambient display
Meet Bubble AI

Your OS has a
personality now.

Bubble AI is the intelligent core of MultiOS Deep Island — powered by Claude Sonnet 4.6 — a context-aware assistant that lives inside your system, not just an app. Powered by the adorable Bubble mascot, it knows what you need before you ask.

Natural voice interaction — just say the word
AI-generated images on demand, from the OS layer
Smart morning briefings: music, news, your schedule
Contextual suggestions that learn your habits

Themes designed by Nari2d & team
"Deep Island"
A name born from
real ground.

The name Deep Island is a direct tribute to Ilha do Fundão — an island in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, home to one of the country's most important universities. More than a geographic reference, it's a homage to every MultiOS version that came before: the systems that shaped, tested, and built what Deep Island is today.

The island that laid the foundation. This version carries that name as a promise: deep roots, expressive future.

Ilha do Fundão — Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
